prompt: I need to add Organization and WebSite schema to our homepage. We're BuildStack, a dev tools company at https://buildstack.dev. Our logo is at /images/logo.svg, we're on Twitter @buildstackdev, LinkedIn /company/buildstack, and GitHub /buildstack. We also have a site search at /search?q=.
